auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Taggun API key sent with the apikey header. Sign up for a Taggun account and receive the key by email: https://www.taggun.io/register.

actions.name: extract_receipt_simple_url
actions.description: Extract basic receipt or invoice data from a public HTTPS file URL with Taggun.

url.description: Public HTTPS URL containing the receipt or invoice file.

additionalProperties.description: A header value to send while Taggun downloads the receipt URL.

headers.description: Optional headers Taggun should forward while downloading the receipt URL.

extractTime.description: Whether Taggun should return the receipt time when it is found instead of defaulting to noon.

ipAddress.description: The end user's IP address associated with this receipt request.

near.description: A geographic hint such as city, state, or country to help merchant search.

language.description: Optional language hint for Taggun OCR. Leave unset for automatic detection.

ignoreMerchantName.description: Merchant name Taggun should ignore if detected on the receipt.

refresh.description: Whether Taggun should reprocess a receipt that is already stored.

incognito.description: Whether Taggun should avoid saving the receipt in storage.

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Taggun for billing or reporting segmentation.

referenceId.description: Unique reference ID used by Taggun for feedback or training.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting basic receipt or invoice data by URL.

receipt.description: The full receipt OCR payload returned by Taggun.

anyOf.description: Overall Taggun confidence level when returned.
Extracted receipt total amount when returned.
Extracted receipt tax amount when returned.
Extracted merchant country code when returned.
Extracted receipt transaction date when returned.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Taggun receipt OCR output with the full upstream receipt payload preserved.

actions.name: extract_receipt_verbose_url
actions.description: Extract detailed receipt or invoice OCR data from a public HTTPS file URL with Taggun.

url.description: Public HTTPS URL containing the receipt or invoice file.

extractLineItems.description: Whether Taggun should return product line items when found on the receipt.

additionalProperties.description: A header value to send while Taggun downloads the receipt URL.

headers.description: Optional headers Taggun should forward while downloading the receipt URL.

extractTime.description: Whether Taggun should return the receipt time when it is found instead of defaulting to noon.

ipAddress.description: The end user's IP address associated with this receipt request.

near.description: A geographic hint such as city, state, or country to help merchant search.

language.description: Optional language hint for Taggun OCR. Leave unset for automatic detection.

ignoreMerchantName.description: Merchant name Taggun should ignore if detected on the receipt.

refresh.description: Whether Taggun should reprocess a receipt that is already stored.

incognito.description: Whether Taggun should avoid saving the receipt in storage.

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Taggun for billing or reporting segmentation.

referenceId.description: Unique reference ID used by Taggun for feedback or training.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting detailed receipt or invoice data by URL.

receipt.description: The full receipt OCR payload returned by Taggun.

anyOf.description: Overall Taggun confidence level when returned.
Extracted receipt total amount when returned.
Extracted receipt tax amount when returned.
Extracted merchant country code when returned.
Extracted receipt transaction date when returned.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Taggun receipt OCR output with the full upstream receipt payload preserved.

actions.name: get_campaign_settings
actions.description: Get Taggun validation settings for an existing campaign ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Taggun campaign settings.

campaignId.description: The Taggun campaign ID that was requested.

outputSchema.description: The campaign settings returned by Taggun.

actions.name: list_campaign_ids
actions.description: List Taggun campaign IDs linked to the connected account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Taggun campaign IDs.

campaignIds.description: Campaign IDs linked to the connected Taggun account.

outputSchema.description: The campaign ID list returned by Taggun.

actions.name: validate_receipt_url
actions.description: Validate a public HTTPS receipt or invoice URL against existing Taggun campaign settings.

url.description: Public HTTPS URL containing the receipt or invoice file.

additionalProperties.description: A header value to send while Taggun downloads the receipt URL.

headers.description: Optional headers Taggun should forward while downloading the receipt URL.

referenceId.description: Receipt reference ID for duplicate handling and tracking.

userId.description: End-user identifier used by Taggun fraud checks.

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Taggun for reporting or billing segmentation.

incognito.description: Whether Taggun should avoid saving the receipt in storage.

ipAddress.description: The end user's IP address associated with this validation request.

near.description: A geographic hint such as city, state, or country to help merchant search.

language.description: Optional language hint for Taggun OCR. Leave unset for automatic detection.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for validating a receipt URL against Taggun campaign settings.

validation.description: The full validation payload returned by Taggun.

anyOf.description: Whether all enabled campaign validation checks passed.

items.description: One failed validation key returned by Taggun.
One passed validation key returned by Taggun.

anyOf.description: Taggun tracking ID for this validation request.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Taggun receipt validation output with the full upstream validation payload preserved.
